name: alchemy-codex-local-mode
description: Exact V3 Provider Prompt parity for conversation-only Codex images

interface.shortDescription: Exact Alchemy Provider Prompts for Codex native ImageGen.
interface.longDescription: A disabled-by-default canonical-prompt plugin. Alchemy uses its remote Brain and the same final Provider materializer; Codex renders the returned prompt verbatim as a conversation-only image.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Codex Native ImageGen Mode only when I explicitly request it. Obtain each canonical Alchemy Provider Prompt, pass it to native ImageGen verbatim once, and do not treat the conversation-only image as an Alchemy delivery.
